_note: preview daemon has no macOS TCC permission for ~/Documents — serve a /private/tmp mirror instead; re-run: cp fc26-heatmap.html /private/tmp/tactics-preview/ after edits

configurations.name: heatmap
runtimeArgs: import os,functools;from http.server import ThreadingHTTPServer, SimpleHTTPRequestHandler;port=int(os.environ.get('PORT','8123'));H=functools.partial(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, directory='/private/tmp/tactics-preview');ThreadingHTTPServer(('127.0.0.1',port), H).serve_forever()
